nasb.text: The Lord descended in the cloud and stood there with him as he called upon the name of the Lord.

esv.text: The Lord  descended in the cloud and stood with him there, and proclaimed the name of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華在雲彩中降下來，與摩西一同站在那裡，並且宣告耶和華的名字。

ccb.text: 耶和华在云中降临和摩西一同站在那里，宣告祂的名——耶和华。
